text:
well! the chase to the dhcp versions race began...
	from this point, you'll have to commit changes faster
	than they goes obsolete... ready, go ;^)

	Makefile
		PORTVERSION bumped to 3.0.r2
		DISTNAME heuristic changed.
	distname
		updated
	files/patch-freebsd
		updated

Fix: cd /usr/ports/net/isc-dhcp3; patch -p1 < this_file
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
